Name: Ozymandias
Description: Ozymandias was Baphomet 's messenger, often Baphomet spoke through Ozymandias. When the Nightbreed were decimated by the humans in Egyptian times, Baphomet and Ozymandias built a city along the river Nile. Sepsis, the mother of Ozymandias suggested building a temple for Baphomet. Over the years, Ozymandias grew dissatisfied with his followers, who, under the guidance of Ozymandias, had convinced the humans they were their masters. One day, Baphomet just stood up from his temple and left, leaving Ozymandias behind.
